title: Imthitill
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{City |image= |name=Imthitill |constructed=Prior to [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' to [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]. |destroyed= |rebuilt= |builder= |mayor= |celestialbody=[[Ando/Legends|Ando]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' |continent= |location=A vast atoll{{CSWECite|II|99|Imthitill}} |climate= |interest= |population= |demonym= |affiliation=[[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] inhabitants }} {{Quote|They've gone mad. They're destroying droids all over the city!''"
"''They aren't mad. They're just frightened. The Yuuzhan Vong are on Ando, and may well conquer the planet.|A [[Unidentified 3D-4 administrative droid|3D-4 administrative droid]] and Dorsk 82|}} '''Imthitill''' was an atoll-[[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ando/Legends|Ando]] that possessed cylindrical [[Color/Legends|white]] towers and was home to members of the [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]], the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Dorsk 82]] was [[Death/Legends|killed]] outside Imthitill after he tried to save some of the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] that the inhabitants of the atoll-city were destroying to appease the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invading]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. ==Description== Imthitill was a [[City/Legends|city]] located on a vast atoll in one of the [[Salt/Legends|salt]]-[[Water/Legends|water]] [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ando/Legends|Ando]], the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. The city contained cylindrical [[Color/Legends|white]] towers that had lights, and a stone causeway—ancient by the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]—connected Imthitill to an abandoned [[Fishing/Legends|fishing]] platform. Other [[Fish/Legends|fishing]] platforms floated on the waters near the atoll-city. ==History== In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invaded]] [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and began an assault on the government of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] as the invaders strove to reach the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' By 26 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]], the Yuuzhan Vong had [[Invasion of Ando (Yuuzhan Vong War)|reached]] Ando in the Mid Rim, where the inhabitants began to destroy [[Droid/Legends|droids]] to appease the invaders, who considered such mechanical things to be abominations. In Imthitill, droids were exterminated all over the city using a massive [[Fire/Legends|fire]], though the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Dorsk 82]] managed to herd thirty-eight droids to his [[Dorsk 82's starship|starship]] on the abandoned fishing platform so he could get them off-world. Despite being pursued by a mob of Aqualish who were intent on destroying the droids, Dorsk 82 met his doom when a group of eight [[Security officer/Legends|security officers]] had his [[Starship/Legends|starship]] destroyed before it could takeoff and then proceeded to [[Death/Legends|kill]] the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] on the causeway. ==Inhabitants== Imthitill was home to at least fifty members of the Aqualish species, with at least [[Unidentified Aqualish tug worker|one]] of them working on a tug. In addition, droids were present in Imthitill until the purge in 26 ABY. The city also had security [[Officer/Legends|officers]], who wore yellow [[Armor/Legends|body armor]]. ==Behind the scenes== The city of Imthitill first appeared in [[Greg Keyes]]' [[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest|''Edge of Victory I: Conquest'']], a [[2001]] installment of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Imthitill }} [[Category:Ando locations]] [[Category:Cities]]
